---
title: "Binning"
author: "Dhevin Fernando"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Binning
first i changed directory to the top level of my project
```bash
cd ~/marine-genomics
```

then i created and changed into a metabat directory
```bash
mkdir metabat
cd metabat
```

i then extracted the depth info 
```bash
cat ../flye/bbd/assembly_info.txt  | grep -v '#' | awk '{OFS="\t";print $1,$3}' > depths_bbd.txt
```
 and reordered the contigs based on their depth with the command
 ```bash
 cat depths_bbd.txt | awk '{print $1}' | xargs samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta > assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta
 ```
 i then ran metabat with the following command
 ```bash
 metabat2 -i assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta -a depths_bbd.txt --cvExt -o bins_bbd/metabat --seed 5
 ```
